name: io.github.po4erk91/thread-keeper
title: thread-keeper
description: Multi-agent shared brain across Claude Code/Desktop, Codex, Antigravity CLI, Gemini, Copilot, and VS Code. One local SQLite store for threads, notes, verbatim quotes, and a dialectic user model; spawn/broadcast/whisper/inbox multi-agent coordination; autonomous loops that materialize SKILL.md skills into every connected CLI's skills root.
